visitorMessage: I have a complaint about my last project." Check your terminal for a red escalation alert.
agentResponse:
I'm sorry to hear you've had an issue with your project. That's definitely something that deserves Tiffany's direct attention. I'd love to help get this resolved for you.

The best way forward is to have a conversation with Tiffany directly so she can understand what happened and make it right. Would you be open to scheduling a call with her? If you share your email, I can have her reach out to you to discuss this.
